positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    ~read(X0,X1) | gains_knowledge(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    harry != walden).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    gains_knowledge(harry)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    read(harry,walden)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~gains_knowledge(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define smarter(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    harry != walden).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    read(harry,walden)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    gains_knowledge(harry)).

cnf(u14,negated_conjecture,
    ~smarter(X0) | gains_knowledge(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    smarter(harry)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    ~gains_knowledge(X0) | smarter(X0)).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    ~read(X0,X1) | gains_knowledge(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
